title: RegistryOps Derived Aggregated State Record
description: Derived aggregated state projection subordinate to the append-only event journal. Each record is scoped by the pair (surface_type, asset_ref).

surface_type.description: Canonical surface type of the public observation scope for this derived aggregated state record.

asset_ref.description: Canonical reference of the observed asset within the scope of the associated surface_type.

first_seen_at.description: Earliest observed_at value for this (surface_type, asset_ref) pair in canonical event history.

last_observed_at.description: Latest observed_at value for this (surface_type, asset_ref) pair in canonical event history.

event_count_total.description: Total number of canonical events associated with this (surface_type, asset_ref) pair after deduplication.

persistence_duration_days.description: Floor of the duration in days between first_seen_at and last_observed_at.

last_state_update.description: System recomputation timestamp for this derived state projection.

state_level.description: Derived analytical classification only; not canonical event truth.
